headline: Tulyp Medical Appoints Industry Veteran Steve Motes as CEO to Lead Next Phase of Growth in the US
summary: PARIS & DALLAS, May 18, 2026--Tulyp Medical, a Paris-based medical device company developing an intelligent pressure-driven perfusion system, today announced the appointment of Steve Motes as Chief Executive Officer. The appointment follows positive results from the company’s first-in-human study.
